title: mentha longifolia subsp. bouvieri
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. bouvieri, also known as Corsican horsemint or spearmint, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Mentha longifolia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. bouvieri include relief from digestive issues, reduction of stress and anxiety, and alleviation of cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used for topical application, aromatherapy, or internal consumption.
